name: Madeleines
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pound unsalted butter, melted and cooled
optional: freshly grated lemon zest or almond paste
optional: dust with powdered sugar after baking
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Butter and flour the madeleine pans. If using a non-stick pan, only use cooking spray.
3. Beat the eggs, salt, and sugar together until thick (8 minutes).
4. Add the vanilla extract.
5. Fold in the flour, gently.
6. Gently fold in the melted butter.
7. Quickly spoon the mixture into the madeleine pans, filling them about 3/4 full.
8. Bake until golden brown, about 8-10 minutes.
9. Remove from pans and let cool on racks.
